description: Triggers when the user wants to create any kind of diagram using Mermaid syntax

queries.query: draw a flowchart for the user registration process
create a sequence diagram showing how the API handles a request
I need a class diagram for my data model
generate a mermaid state machine for the order lifecycle
make a mindmap of the product strategy topics
create an ER diagram for the database schema
gantt chart for the Q3 project timeline
diagram the architecture of our microservices
show me the flow from login to checkout in a diagram
visualize the states a document can be in using mermaid
write me a Python script to parse CSV files
summarize this YouTube video
create an Excalidraw diagram for the system architecture
optimize my resume for ATS
add a wikilink to the Budget page in this note
what is the best way to structure a REST API?
create a canvas in Obsidian with my notes
transcribe this audio file into markdown
analyze the market for my startup idea
write a cover letter for this job posting
